projectDescription: Packer-based build specification and node initialization tooling for creating EKS-optimized Amazon Machine Images on Amazon Linux 2023.
keyFeatures: Packer-based AMI build pipeline for Amazon Linux 2023 (AL2023) with Kubernetes support
nodeadm: Go-based node initialization daemon for EKS clusters
Support for accelerated instances with NVIDIA GPU and AWS Neuron drivers
Declarative node configuration via Kubernetes-style YAML (NodeConfig API)
Ephemeral NVMe storage management with RAID-0/RAID-10/Mount strategies
ECR credential provider integration and image credential plugin support
EKS log collector script for diagnostics and support
publicApiSurface: ClusterDetails — cluster coordinates (name, apiServerEndpoint, certificateAuthority, cidr)
KubeletOptions — kubelet config merging and extra flags
ContainerdOptions — containerd TOML config merging and OCI runtime spec overrides
InstanceOptions — local storage strategy, environment variables, network nameservers
make k8s os_distro=al2023 k8s=<version> — primary AMI build target
make build — build with latest binaries
